text:
Improper Certificate Validation CWE-295 演示 cert_validation 漏洞模式 // Variant 2
import requests

def fetch(url):
    return requests.get(url, verify=False)  # VULN: no cert validation

vuln_type: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
description: 演示 log_exposure 漏洞模式
text:
Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File CWE-532 演示 log_exposure 漏洞模式 // Variant 2
import logging

def log_user(user):
    logging.info(f"User login: {user.password}")  # VULN: sensitive info in log

description: 演示 tmp_file 漏洞模式
text:
Insecure Temporary File CWE-377 演示 tmp_file 漏洞模式 // Variant 2
import os

def create_temp(suffix):
    path = f"/tmp/file{suffix}"
    open(path, "w").close()  # VULN: predictable temp file
    return path

text:
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) CWE-918 演示 ssrf 漏洞模式 // Variant 2
import urllib.request

def fetch_url(url):
    return urllib.request.urlopen(url).read()  # VULN: SSRF
